name: Sandie pure count (no engine gate, FR16) — proves the count model: one box +1, both teammates +2, one each 0 (contested), ALL FOUR 0 (2 vs 2 nets out). A checked sandie always counts; anyone can get one. All nets = par so base points are 0 — the ledger reflects SANDIE points only.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the F1 sandie modifier (Story 2.4). Sandie = an up-and-down-from-sand CLAIM the scorer checks — accepted as entered (FR16), NEVER software-validated (Josh ratified 2026-06-22: no score gate; the 'par/bogey or better' convention is a Rules-Sheet item, Story 2.7). COUNT-BASED, STATELESS: sandiePointsA = (# teamA sandies) − (# teamB sandies), range −2..+2, each unit a team point (+1 each winner-team player / −1 each opponent). A checked sandie always counts (no gross, no variant). SettlementEdge IR = post-Story-2.1a whole-dollar 1-to-1. Integer cents; fromPlayerId PAYS toPlayerId.
_handCalc:
Teams A={a1,a2} B={b1,b2}, flat $5/point, net-skins ON (0 here), sandie ON (no gate). Every net = par => all base points 0. SANDIE per hole (always counts when checked):
  H1 (par4): a1 => countA=1 countB=0 => +1.
  H2 (par5): a1+a2 => countA=2 => +2 (a team gets 2 when both teammates have one + neither opponent does).
  H3 (par3): b1 => countB=1 => −1.
  H4 (par4): a1+b1 => 1 vs 1 => 0 (contested).
  H5 (par4): a1+a2+b1+b2 => 2 vs 2 => 0 (ALL FOUR net out).
Round sandieA = +1+2−1+0+0 = +2. Each A player +2*500 = +1000c (+$10), each B −1000c. Zero-sum. H4 + H5 both pts=0 => skipped => no edges, total unchanged.
EDGES (1-to-1): b1->a1 1000, b2->a2 1000. ledgerTotal = 2000c.
ORDER-INDEPENDENCE: the golden test recomputes with holes reversed and asserts byte-identical (stateless).
